Email test: user@domain.com should not be a tag.
But @valid_tag should be.

Multi-line tag:
@multiline(
    key1="value 1",
    key2="value 2",
    key3=42,
)

Numeric bases:
@numbers(dec=42, hex=0xff, oct=0o77, bin=0b1010, float=3.14, neg=-5)

Quoted strings:
@quoted(double="hello world", single='single quoted', escaped="has \"quotes\"")

Tag with no attrs: @bare

Tag name variations:
@_underscore_start
@-hyphen-start
@MiXeD_CaSe-123

Invalid (should be skipped): @1invalid_start

Tag termination: @terminated::extra is just @terminated

Overflow: @overflow(n=99999999999999999999)
